mapper.select: SELECT * FROM suppliers WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM suppliers WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.category, i.unit, i.stock_qty, i.min_stock, i.unit_cost, i.supplier_id, i.created_at, i.updated_at, s.supplier_name AS supplier FROM ingredients i LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON i.supplier_id = s.id AND s.is_active = 1 WHERE i.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY FIELD(i.category,'원두','유제품','시럽/소스','파우더','차류','소모품','기타'), i.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_name, supplier_type, ceo_name, address, contract_file, note) VALUES (#{supplier_name}, #{supplier_type}, #{ceo_name}, #{address}, #{contract_file}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE suppliers SET supplier_name = #{supplier_name}, supplier_type = #{supplier_type}, ceo_name = #{ceo_name}, address = #{address}, contract_file = #{contract_file}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
